response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) work, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, his experience in production-grade AI solutions and RAG architectures is less explicitly detailed, and his leadership in customer-facing technical roles is not fully evidenced.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Python-adjacent tools (Node.js), and cloud platforms (AWS).
Proven contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, relevant to agentic workflows.
Strong background in developer tooling, observability, and mentorship, supporting engineering excellence.
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (focus is broader).
Experience with vector databases and RAG architectures is not clearly documented.
Customer-facing technical leadership (e.g., stakeholder discovery sessions) is underemphasized.
